summary: A clip of a press conference. A man in a dark suit with eyeglasses speaks at a lectern, another man standing to his side, in front of a backdrop reading OPERATION TWIN SHIELD with the U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services and U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement wordmarks. A U.S. flag stands at the left.

script.scene: A man speaks at a lectern in front of an OPERATION TWIN SHIELD backdrop with USCIS and ICE wordmarks.
The speaker continues, another official standing beside him.
Continued footage of the press conference at the lectern.

notable_text: OPERATION TWIN SHIELD; U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services; U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement
